admin_required: ▲ Bot needs the invite users via link permission.
admin_cache_wait: ▲  Admin cache can only be refreshed once every 10 minutes.
auth_is_admin: ▲  This user is already an admin.
auto_left: ▌ Voice chat empty. ◈ Jatt Music Bot has left.
bl_invalid: ▲  Only chat IDs and user IDs are supported.
bl_user_notify: ⊘ You have been blacklisted from Jatt Music Bot. ◈ Contact support for help.
dl_active: ▲  Already downloading that file. Please wait.
dl_limit: ✗ File too large. Maximum size is 200 MB.
error_no_audio: ▲  Audio source not found. Moving to next track...
error_no_call: No Active Voice Chat ◈ Start a voice chat and try again.
error_no_file: ✗ Download failed. Contact support if this persists.
error_tg_server: Telegram Error ◈ Clearing queue and leaving voice chat.
gcast_usage: ▲  Reply to a message to broadcast it.
gcast_active: ↺  Please wait for the ongoing broadcast to finish.
help_menu: Help · Jatt Music Bot Select a category.
help_admins: Admin Commands /pause — Pause stream /resume — Resume stream /skip — Skip track /stop — End stream /seek [s] — Jump forward /seekback [s] — Jump back /reload — Refresh admin list
help_auth: Auth Commands Authorized users control the stream without being admin. /auth [reply] — Add authorized user /unauth [reply] — Remove authorized user /authlist — List authorized users
help_blist: Blacklist /blacklist [id] — Block a chat or user /unblacklist [id] — Unblock
help_lang: Language /lang — Change bot language for this chat
help_play: Play Commands /play [query] — Stream audio /vplay [query] — Stream video Add -f to force-play (skips queue) /nowplaying — Now playing card /queue — Show queue /clearqueue /cq — Clear queue /shuffle — Shuffle queue /skipto [pos] — Jump to position /move [from] [to] — Move track /remove [pos] /rm — Remove track /volume [1-200] /vol — Set volume /voteskip /vs — Vote to skip /save — Save to DM /search [query] — Pick from top 5 results /history — Recently played /top — Most played /queuetime /qt — Total remaining playtime /songinfo /si — Current track metadata /replay5 — Rewind 5 seconds /autoplay — Toggle auto-queue on empty /schedule [HH:MM] [song] — Schedule a track
help_queue: Queue Commands /queue — View queue /clearqueue /cq — Clear queue /shuffle — Shuffle queue /move [from] [to] — Move a track /remove [pos] /rm — Remove a track /history — Recently played /top — Most played
help_sudo: Sudo Commands /ac — Active call count /activevc — List active streams /broadcast — Broadcast a message /eval — Execute code /logs — Fetch log file /restart — Restart bot /addsudo — Add sudo user /rmsudo — Remove sudo user /maintenance — Toggle maintenance mode /setprefix [char] — Set command prefix /botstats — Global play statistics
ping_pong: Jatt Music Bot · Status ◈ Latency — {0} ms ◈ Uptime — {1} ◈ CPU — {2}% ◈ RAM — {3}% ◈ Disk — {4}% ◈ Call Ping — {5} ms
play_admin: ▌ Admin-Only Mode ◈ Only admins can play music in this chat.
play_log: ▌ {0} Play Log ◈ Chat — {1} | {2} ◈ User — {3} | {4} ◈ Message — {5} ◈ Title — {6} ◈ Duration — {7}
play_duration_limit: ✗ Streams longer than {0} minutes are not allowed.
play_queue_full: ▲  Queue is full ({0} tracks). Wait for a track to finish.
play_not_found: ✗ Could not process your query. ◈ Contact support if this persists.
play_chat_invalid: ✗ This bot only works in supergroups. ◈ Enable visible chat history, then try again. Leaving...
play_user_invalid:
✗  You appear to be an anonymous admin.

  ◈  Switch to your user account and try again.
playlist_error: ✗  Something went wrong fetching the playlist.
start_pm: Jatt Music Bot Stream music in any Telegram voice chat. ◈ YouTube playback — audio and video ◈ Queue management — move, remove, shuffle ◈ Play history and top tracks ◈ Multi-language support Add me to a group to get started.
start_gp: Jatt Music Bot is ready. ◈ Use /play to start streaming. ◈ Use /help for all commands.
start_settings: Settings · {0} Configure how the bot behaves in this group.
stats_sudo: System ◈ Modules — {0} ◈ Platform — {1} ◈ RAM — {2} MB / {3} GB ◈ CPU — {4}% ({5} cores) ◈ Storage — {6} / {7} GB Runtime ◈ Python — v{8} ◈ Pyrogram — v{9} ◈ PyTgCalls — v{10}
stats_user: Jatt Music Bot · {0} ◈ Assistants — {1} ◈ Auto leave — {2} ◈ Blocked chats — {3} ◈ Blocked users — {4} ◈ Sudo users — {5} ◈ Served chats — {6} ◈ Served users — {7}
user_not_admin: ✗  You need to be an admin to use this command.
user_no_perms: ✗  You don't have permission to control the voice chat.
user_not_found: ▲  Reply to a message or provide a user ID.
clearqueue_done: ▌ Queue Cleared ◈ {0} track(s) removed. Current track continues.
clearqueue_empty: ◈  The queue has no tracks to clear.
move_usage: ▌ Usage /move [from] [to] Example — /move 2 4 Positions are 1-indexed, excluding the current track.
move_invalid: ✗ Invalid position. Queue has {0} waiting track(s).
move_same: ▲  Track is already at that position.
remove_usage: ▌ Usage /remove [position] Example — /remove 2 Position is 1-indexed, excluding the current track.
remove_invalid: ✗ Invalid position. Queue has {0} waiting track(s).
history_empty: ◈  No play history yet in this chat.
setprefix_invalid: ✗ Prefix must be 1–3 characters with no spaces.
shuffle_empty: ▲  Need at least 2 queued tracks to shuffle.
volume_error: ✗  Failed to change volume. Is the voice chat active?
voteskip_vote: ▌ Vote Skip ◈ Votes — {0} / {1} Vote expires in 60 seconds.
voteskip_already: ▲  You have already voted to skip.
top_empty: ◈  No play data yet in this chat.
save_done: ✓  Track info sent to your DM.
save_error: ✗  Start a DM with me first, then try again.
songinfo_text: Track Info ◈ Title — {0} ◈ Channel — {1} ◈ Views — {2} ◈ Duration — {3} ◈ Requested by — {4} ◈ Type — {5} ◈ URL — {6}
botstats_text: Bot Stats ◈ Total plays — {0} ◈ Served chats — {1} ◈ Served users — {2}
schedule_queued: ◈ Scheduled track {0} added to queue at #{1}
queuelock_on: ◉  Queue locked. Only admins can add tracks.
queuelock_off: ✓  Queue unlocked. All users can add tracks.
queuelock_blocked: ✗  Queue is locked. Only admins can add tracks.
autoplay_on: ✓  Autoplay enabled. Bot will suggest related tracks when queue empties.
localban_blocked: ⊘  You are restricted from using the bot in this group.
localbans_empty: ◈  No local bans in this group.
help_effects: Audio Effects /speed [0.5-2.0] — Playback speed /bass [0-10] — Bass boost /nightcore — Nightcore preset /mono — Mono output /3d — 3D surround /reverb — Reverb effect /cleareffects /ce — Remove all effects
help_limits: Admin Limits /setlimit [mins] — Max track duration /setqueue [n] — Max queue size /queuelock — Admin-only queue toggle /autoplay — Auto-queue on empty /localban [reply] — Ban user from bot in group /localunban [reply] — Unban user /localbans — List local bans
